name: tier1_thorough
description: Full overnight Tier 1 ablation on 49-clip BJ dataset. 4 groups: rank, alpha, regularisation, and best combinations. ~10-12h depending on GPU.

experiments.description: Rank 16 baseline — reference point for all groups.
Rank 32 — midpoint. Does doubling rank improve quality without overfitting?
Rank 64 — MMAudio LoRA guide default. Maximum expressiveness at 49 clips.
Alpha=8 with rank 16 (scale=0.5). Reduces intruder singular dimensions (arXiv:2410.21228).
Alpha=32 with rank 64 (scale=0.5). Best-practice scaling for high-rank adapters.
LoRA+ ratio=4 — conservative asymmetric LR. Lower bound for the technique.
LoRA+ ratio=16 — standard from FLUX LoRA literature. Faster early convergence.
LoRA dropout 0.05 only. Light sparsity regularisation (arXiv:2404.09610).
LoRA dropout 0.1 only. Stronger regularisation — may prevent overfitting past step 2000.
Curriculum sampling only: logit_normal steps 1-2400, then uniform (arXiv:2603.12517).
All Tier 1 at rank 16: LoRA+ 16 + dropout 0.05 + curriculum.
All Tier 1 at rank 64 + alpha=32. Best expressiveness + best regularisation.
